## Looking ahead: automatic pipelines

Manual export → IPT works well for most datasets — especially one-off or periodically-updated ones

But...

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Good to know
For institutions publishing **continuously or at scale**, you can set up a pipeline that pushes formatted data from an internal database → Darwin Core → the IPT via the API
:::

::: {.notes}
This is a "know it exists" pointer, not a how-to — if it's relevant to your institution, your node manager is the right first contact.
Flagging this honestly as something to explore later rather than teaching it live — good to mention institutions with recurring monitoring data (e.g. long-term time series) sometimes go this route, but it's a bigger lift (needs IPT API/database connection setup) than what we can responsibly cover in this workshop.
:::
